org.jfree.chart.renderer.category

Class DefaultCategoryItemRenderer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jfree.chart.renderer.AbstractRenderer
      • org.jfree.chart.renderer.category.AbstractCategoryItemRenderer
        • org.jfree.chart.renderer.category.LineAndShapeRenderer
          • org.jfree.chart.renderer.category.DefaultCategoryItemRenderer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, LegendItemSource, CategoryItemRenderer, PublicCloneable

    public class DefaultCategoryItemRenderer
extends LineAndShapeRenderer
implements Serializable
    A default renderer for the CategoryPlot class. This is simply an alias for the LineAndShapeRenderer class.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
